_comment: Divergences from the shipped Civilization VI database that CIVVIS accepts
on purpose. Every entry needs a reason; anything not listed here counts
against the ratchet in tools/civ6_fidelity.py. Use '*' to waive a field
across a whole table. Shrinking this file is the fidelity roadmap.

waivers.reason: Future-era techs carry RandomPrereqs in Gathering Storm: the game draws prerequisites per game rather than storing them. CIVVIS models a fixed chain instead.
Future-era RandomPrereqs; see advanced_ai.
Future-era RandomPrereqs; see advanced_ai.
Future-era RandomPrereqs; see advanced_ai.
Future-era RandomPrereqs; see advanced_ai.
Future-era RandomPrereqs; see advanced_ai.
Future-era RandomPrereqs; see advanced_ai.
Gated behind the randomized Future-era techs, so its prerequisite set is drawn per game like theirs.
Future-era civics use the same RandomPrereqs draw as Future-era techs.
Future-era RandomPrereqs; see cultural_hegemony.
Future-era RandomPrereqs; see cultural_hegemony.
Future-era RandomPrereqs; see cultural_hegemony.
Future-era RandomPrereqs; see cultural_hegemony.
Gated behind the randomized Future-era civics; prerequisite set is drawn per game.
The Mobile SAM's game Range column is its interception radius; CIVVIS stores that as anti_air_range and keeps range for units that can strike ground targets.
The game drives Archaeologist excavations from a unit operation rather than a charge column, so the Units table reports none. CIVVIS models the same three uses as charges.
National Park creation is a unit operation in the game database; CIVVIS models the single use as a charge.
The City Center is never produced in CIVVIS - founding a city places it - so it carries no production cost.
The database stores 0: the real repair cost is computed from accumulated wall damage. CIVVIS prices the project symbolically at 1 and scales by damage the same way.
The shipped volcano feature rides impassable mountain terrain; CIVVIS marks the feature itself impassable so a volcano blocks movement wherever it stands.
The shipped row is Lake=true - a water plot land units cannot enter. CIVVIS has no per-feature lake flag and spells the same rule as impassable.
